data.title: PreBash hook should block direct calls to record-test-status.sh by agents
data.description: Agents (and orchestrators) should not be able to call record-test-status.sh directly via a Bash tool call. Calling it outside of the pre-commit hook context bypasses the safeguards that ensure the correct staged-file set is used, producing stale or incorrect test-gate-status entries. A PreToolUse/PreBash hook guard should detect when the command matches record-test-status.sh and block the call with an explanatory message directing the caller to stage files and let the pre-commit hook run record-test-status automatically.
